questions.questionMd: What is the concept of currying in the context of functional JavaScript?

options.text: Converting a synchronous function into an asynchronous Promise-based function
Defining a class method that can accept a variable number of parameters
Constructing a new function that is partially pre-filled with arguments from an outer function
Binding an event listener to multiple HTML elements at the same time

questions.explanationMd: Currying is the process of taking a function with multiple arguments and turning it into a sequence of functions each with a single argument.

questions.questionMd: What is the primary role of the Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP)?

options.text: To assign unique IP addresses to devices on the Internet
To convert domain names into numerical IP addresses
To encrypt data transmitted between two computers
To transport hypertext documents from web servers to client computers

questions.questionMd: On which TCP port does an HTTP server listen by default?
Which keyword is used to create a new instance of an ES6 class?

options.text: new
create
instantiate
init

questions.questionMd: When defining methods inside an ES6 class body, which keyword must you omit?

options.text: class
const
return
function

questions.explanationMd: In ES6 classes, method definitions do not use the `function` keyword.

questions.questionMd: Compared to HTTP/1.1, what is a key advantage of HTTP/2.0?

options.text: HTTP/2.0 eliminates the need for DNS lookups before connecting to a server
HTTP/2.0 keeps the connection open and allows multiple resources to be fetched simultaneously
HTTP/2.0 only supports text-based content and not binary data
HTTP/2.0 encrypts all data by default using SSL certificates

questions.explanationMd: HTTP/2 introduces multiplexing, allowing multiple requests and responses to be sent concurrently over a single TCP connection.

questions.questionMd: According to the lecture, what is an important limitation of the CustomEvent API in JavaScript?

options.text: CustomEvents can only be created inside ES6 class constructors
CustomEvents can only be dispatched and listened to on HTML elements, not on arbitrary class instances
CustomEvents cannot carry any additional data in their event object
CustomEvents are not supported in any browser that uses the V8 engine

questions.questionMd: Which of the following is a characteristic of first-class functions in JavaScript?

options.text: Functions cannot be stored in variables or object properties
Functions can be passed as parameters to other functions
Functions must always be declared before the class definition
Functions require the function keyword and cannot use arrow syntax

questions.questionMd: What is the primary purpose of the Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) in Internet communication?

options.text: To ensure the integrity of network communication
To define the visual layout of web pages
To translate domain names into IP addresses
To assign unique MAC addresses to network devices

questions.questionMd: What is the role of SGML (Standard Generalized Markup Language) in relation to HTML?

options.text: SGML is a transport protocol that HTTP was built upon
SGML is a standard for specifying markup languages and was used by Tim Berners-Lee to create the HTML specification
SGML is a scripting language that adds interactivity to static HTML pages
SGML is a stylesheet language used to define the visual presentation of XML documents

questions.questionMd: According to the lecture, what is the JavaScript coding convention for indicating that a method is intended to be private?

options.text: Wrapping the method body inside a closure immediately
Declaring the method with const instead of inside the class body
Prefixing the method name with an underscore, e.g. _methodName()
Using the private keyword before the method definition

questions.questionMd: When using the concise arrow function syntax, under what conditions can you omit the curly braces and the return keyword?

options.text: When the function takes more than two parameters
When the function body contains only a single return statement
When the function is assigned to a variable declared with var
When the function is defined inside a class constructor

questions.questionMd: In the URL `http://www.example.com:8088`, what does the value `8088` represent?

options.text: The version number of the HTTP protocol being used
The number of packets sent in the HTTP request
The TCP port on which the HTTP server is listening
The subnet mask of the server's IP address

questions.questionMd: What problem does calling `this.methodName = this.methodName.bind(this)` in a constructor solve?

options.text: It copies the method's code into the HTML element for faster execution
It ensures `this` always refers to the class instance when the method is used as an event handler
It registers the method as a global function accessible from any scope
It prevents the method from being called more than once per event

questions.questionMd: ES6 classes were introduced in which version of the ECMAScript standard?

options.text: ECMAScript 3 (ES1999)
ECMAScript 5 (ES2009)
ECMAScript 8 (ES2017)
ECMAScript 6 (ES2015)
